content: TASK-081 checkpoint done: added buffered stream input API. `createArchMapStream()` accepts `write(string|Uint8Array)`, `pipe(ReadableStream)`, `flush()`, `close()`, `abort()`, and getters for source/model/result. It buffers source and reparses/rerenders the full accumulated DSL at debounce/flush boundaries; it is intentionally not an incremental parser. Exported from @archmap/core and documented in SYNTAX and engine API. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- stream.test.ts render.test.ts, npm run build. Remaining release work: manual browser smoke on localhost/file demo/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push v0.1.1 tag, verify jsDelivr URLs.
